function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully. I ran the OCR/frontmatter migration workflow on exactly the six files explicitly listed in the inbox request, adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each while preserving the original body text verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files for entered folders, consulted required workflows/schemas before OCR migration, processed exactly the explicit inbox file list, preserved full original note bodies, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed six finance files to run through OCR workflow. Each listed file was read and updated with required invoice/bill schema fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with line items extracted from visible text and the full original markdown body retained below frontmatter. After all six were completed, the inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow rules.
completed_steps_laconic: read workflow/schema AGENTS and OCR/migration docs
write updated frontmatter to all 6 files
